description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, offset-waist body finished in a deep, glossy red color. The front features a metallic pickguard, two single-coil pickups, multiple control knobs, and a distinctive chrome bridge and tremolo system. The neck is made of light-colored wood, likely maple, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and dot inlays. The headstock is a classic six-in-line design, angled slightly and finished in natural wood, with visible tuning pegs. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, showing the rich red finish and the bolt-on neck joint. Chrome hardware and a sleek, ergonomic shape suggest a modern, performance-oriented instrument suitable for urban music scenes.
description: A glossy red electric guitar with a contoured body, chrome hardware, and a six-in-line headstock. Features include a metallic pickguard, two pickups, and multiple control knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red body, metallic pickguard, pickups, control knobs, bridge, and tremolo system.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body and the thickness of the neck and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth red back, bolt-on neck joint, and the natural wood neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness and the protruding hardware on the front.
attribute_headstock_design: Six-in-line, natural wood finish, no visible logo, standard contour
